# Support

Thank you for using Stremio Addon Manager!

If you need help with this project, please consider the following options:

## GitHub Discussions
For general questions, how-to's, or asking for advice, please use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/EithonX/stremio-addon-manager/discussions). 
This is the best place to talk with other users and maintainers without cluttering the bug tracker.

## Bug Reports & Feature Requests
If you have found a reproducible bug or have a clear feature request, please open an issue in the [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/EithonX/stremio-addon-manager/issues) using the provided issue templates.

Please make sure to read the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md) before opening a new issue or pull request.
